This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the TAF APL research files. Because the files have 
such a large number of variables, we have included several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable names. 

• Individual entries for each variable that contain a short description of the variable, the possible values for the
